name: vscode-mu-preview
description: Side-by-side preview for NomadNet micron (.mu) pages. Executes shebang scripts and renders their stdout via Micron2HTML, with LXMF identity / fingerprint simulation and a bandwidth-budget readout.

commands.title: Micron: Open Preview to the Side

muPreview.python.description: Path to a Python interpreter that has micron2html installed. If empty, uses the extension's bundled venv at <extension>/.venv/bin/python (or .venv\Scripts\python.exe on Windows).

muPreview.executeShebang.description: Run executable .mu files (those starting with a shebang) and render their stdout. Disable to render the file contents as static micron source instead.

muPreview.executeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for executing a .mu script before aborting. Cold renders of map-heavy pages can take several seconds the first time a tile is drawn (shapefile loads + spatial-index builds); subsequent renders hit cached data and are fast.

muPreview.slowRenderWarnMs.description: Show a warning notification when a render takes longer than this many milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable.

muPreview.refreshOnSave.description: Re-render the preview whenever the source .mu file is saved.

muPreview.identities.description: LXMF identities (link_ids) the preview can spawn .mu scripts as. Each entry sets the link_id env var that nomadnet would normally provide. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults (Anonymous, Tester Alice, Tester Bob). For the persistent remote_identity hash, use muPreview.fingerprints instead.

name.description: Display name shown in the status bar and identity picker.

linkId.description: 32-character hex link_id (passed as the link_id env var).

muPreview.fingerprints.description: LXMF fingerprints (remote_identity hashes) the preview can present as. Each entry has a nickname for display and a 32-char hex fingerprint. Active only when the fingerprint toggle is on. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults that mirror the demo forum seed (admins / mods / regulars across active / suspended / banned).

nickname.description: Friendly name shown in the status bar and fingerprint picker.

fingerprint.description: 32-character hex remote_identity (passed as the remote_identity env var when active).
